name: @marckrenn/pi-lab
description: pi A/B extension runner for lane-level experiments.

scripts.typecheck: bun -e "await import('./pi-extension/ab/index.ts'); await import('./pi-extension/ab/config.ts'); await import('./pi-extension/ab/runner.ts'); await import('./pi-extension/ab/grading.ts'); await import('./pi-extension/ab/selection.ts'); await import('./pi-extension/ab/winner.ts'); console.log('typecheck-ok')"

author: Marc Krenn <mail@marckrenn.dev>
